channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania's Growth in Banking Agents Shows Significant Progress in Financial Inclusion
item.description: Tanzania has made notable strides in financial inclusion, with a substantial increase in the number of banking agents, reaching 145,450 by 2024, up from 40,410 in 2020. This growth highlights the coun...

item.title: Energy CS Wandayi Faces Fresh Summons in Fuel Scandal Probe
item.description: Parliamentary proceedings took an unexpected turn this week as Energy Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi failed to appear before a House committee investigating the ongoing fuel scandal. The committee, a...

item.title: High-level US-Iran negotiations to be held in Islamabad amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: With tensions between the US and Iran still simmering despite a two-week ceasefire, Islamabad is stepping into the international spotlight as it hosts critical talks this Saturday. The ceasefire, anno...

item.title: Yvette Cooper urges inclusion of Lebanon in US–Iran ceasefire amid regional tensions
item.description: British foreign secretary Yvette Cooper has called for Lebanon to be included in the fragile ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran, as fighting continues to escalate across the Middle...

item.title: Philippine 911 Emergency System Nears Full Deployment with High-Tech Communication Tools
item.description: The Unified 911 Emergency Response System in the Philippines has reached almost 60% completion, marking a major step toward creating one of Asia’s most advanced emergency communication networks. Accor...

item.title: Severe Tropical Cyclone Maila forecast to impact far north Queensland communities
item.description: Severe Tropical Cyclone Maila, a record-breaking system in the Solomon Sea, is slowly heading towards far north Queensland. The cyclone, which at one stage reached category 5 intensity, has been produ...

item.title: Upcoming Movie Highlights: Romance in Italy, Blockbusters and M-Net Early Screenings
item.description: The latest edition of Spotlight showcases a delightful mix of cinematic treats for South African audiences. Central to the feature is the romantic comedy 'You, Me & Tuscany', set in picturesque Tuscan...

item.title: Tanzania Becomes Home to Largest Volcanic Debris Avalanche Deposits
item.description: Tanzania has officially become home to the world's largest volcanic debris avalanche deposits, located at the foot of Mount Meru, the country’s second-highest peak. These debris avalanche deposits (DE...

item.title: Man jailed after stealing designer handbag containing Fabergé egg and watch in Soho
item.description: In a brazen theft in central London, Enzo Conticello, 29, also known as Hakim Boudjenoune, stole a Givenchy handbag belonging to Rosie Dawson, director of premium brands at Craft Irish Whiskey, outsid...

item.title: Chinese vessels fire warning flares at PCG plane during routine West Philippine Sea patrol
item.description: On April 9, 2026, the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) reported that ‘Chinese forces’ fired flares at an unarmed PCG Cessna aircraft conducting a routine patrol over the West Philippine Sea, specifically ...

item.title: Pakistan plays central role in US-Iran peace negotiations
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as a key mediator in the recent ceasefire talks involving the United States, Israel, and Iran. The initiative, first announced by Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on X, highlights Pa...

item.title: Chamdor's Elegant Easter Brunches Across Nigeria
item.description: This Easter, Chamdor, Nigeria’s favourite non-alcoholic sparkling wine, transformed brunch gatherings in Lagos, Abuja, and Port Harcourt. Through partnerships with luxury hotels like Marriott Ikeja, S...

item.title: Election Commission investigates BJP candidate in Palakkad over alleged vote-buying
item.description: The Election Commission of India has initiated an investigation into allegations against Sobha Surendran, the Bharatiya Janata Party candidate from Palakkad, Kerala, for allegedly distributing cash to...

item.title: Trump threatens US military presence around Iran until full compliance with deal
item.description: In a statement on Wednesday, US President Donald Trump made it clear that US military ships and aircraft will remain stationed near Iran until the country fully complies with a deal made with Washingt...

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Offers Temporary Relief, but Long-Term Peace Remains Challenging
item.description: US President Donald Trump recently accepted a Pakistani proposal for a two-week ceasefire with Iran, offering temporary relief to the international community amid fears of escalating conflict. The war...

item.title: Deep Snow Returns to Saskatchewan, Disrupting Travel and Causing Collisions
item.description: Saskatchewan residents are experiencing another unwelcome return of deep snow across the province, marking yet another false start to spring. Environment Canada reports snowfall accumulations exceedin...

item.title: Manav Gohil Comments on Ranveer Singh’s Transformation After 'Dhurandhar' and Deepika Padukone’s Guidance
item.description: Ranveer Singh has reportedly undergone a noticeable personal and professional transformation following his role in the blockbuster films 'Dhurandhar' and 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge.' According to his co...

item.title: Hyrox expands in India as Bengaluru hosts over 8,000 fitness enthusiasts
item.description: The Hyrox global fitness race, founded in Germany in 2017 by Christian Toetzke and Olympian Moritz Fürste, is fast becoming a trend across Indian cities. Combining endurance and strength, Hyrox featur...

item.title: La Caisse Partners with Prologis to Launch European Logistics Joint Venture
item.description: La Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec, a major Canadian institutional investor, is set to partner with global logistics giant Prologis to create a European logistics joint venture. The collaborati...

item.title: PNP Reports Apprehension of 48,000 Individuals During Metro Manila Safer Cities Drive
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported that a total of 48,257 individuals were apprehended over a three-day period as part of the Metro Manila 'Safer Cities' program. The operation ran from Apr...
